text:
$QQQ made my morning band and I'll see ya tomorrow

Working on a really cool idea on the side that you will all soon see! 

Going to start offering 1-on-1 chart teaching for students. Going to be a one-time payment and then you just pick a day of the week, and we meet for either

Nice to meet you, nice to meet you.

The thread of fate has connected us, hasn't it?

Now, my guest.
Do you like your new body?

Try dancing to the rhythm.

The other dolls
are waiting for your dance.

This is the one and only stage
prepared just for you.

If the thread breaks,

As the tools of hackers become more sophisticated, the technical defenses against cyber-attacks we are all used to are increasingly insufficient. Take it from the Head of IDI's Democracy in the Digital Age Program—an expert in cyber security policy—Dr. Tehilla Shwartz Altshuler,
